## What

Describe the change.

## Why

Describe the user problem or linked issue.

## How

Summarize the implementation and important tradeoffs.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:gui` when GUI files changed
- [ ] Packaged smoke test when lifecycle, packaging, or context rescue changed
- [ ] No `config.json`, API key, token, prompt, or private log is included

## Compatibility

List affected clients, routes, providers, and configuration migrations.
